name: Sima Lun (Ziyi)
page_title: Sima Lun (Ziyi) 司馬倫 (子彛) [Wei, Jin] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: A superstitious and foolish man, he usurped the Jin throne from Sima Zhong.
sections.details:

	司馬倫 (子彛)

	Ssŭ-ma Lun (Tzŭ-i)
sections.biography-source-undefined:
The Prince of Zhao; [Sima] Lun, styled Ziyi, was the ninth son of the Commanding Emperor. His mother was Lady Bai. During the beginning of the Wei Jiaping era, he was enfeoffed as District Marquis of Anle. When the Five Ranks were established, he changed fief to Viscount of Dong’an. He was conferred as Grandee Remonstrate.

趙王倫，字子彞，宣帝第九子也，母曰柏夫人。魏嘉平初，封安樂亭侯。五等建，改封東安子，拜諫議大夫。

full_text:
Sima Lun (Ziyi) 司馬倫 (子彛)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Lun (司馬倫), styledZiyi (子彛). A superstitious and foolish man, he usurped the Jin throne from Sima Zhong. Sima Lun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
